## Meeting Purpose

[Discuss potential collaboration between The Adventures Group and GrowthX for content creation and SEO optimization.](https://fathom.video/share/KCax7jdusJAnGfxCF7LQpxb6uXhRbEuv?tab=summary&timestamp=13.0)

## Key Takeaways

  - [GrowthX employs a hybrid AI-assisted/human-edited approach for content creation, ensuring quality and accuracy](https://fathom.video/share/KCax7jdusJAnGfxCF7LQpxb6uXhRbEuv?tab=summary&timestamp=146.0)
  - [The process involves extensive research, custom instructions, and multiple layers of fact-checking and editing](https://fathom.video/share/KCax7jdusJAnGfxCF7LQpxb6uXhRbEuv?tab=summary&timestamp=146.0)
  - [GrowthX emphasizes long-term SEO strategy, with initial results typically taking 3+ months to materialize](https://fathom.video/share/KCax7jdusJAnGfxCF7LQpxb6uXhRbEuv?tab=summary&timestamp=301.0)
  - [Collaboration and clear communication between client and GrowthX team is crucial for success](https://fathom.video/share/KCax7jdusJAnGfxCF7LQpxb6uXhRbEuv?tab=summary&timestamp=987.0)

## Topics

### Content Creation Process

  - [AI-assisted research and drafting, followed by human editing (1+ hour per piece)](https://fathom.video/share/KCax7jdusJAnGfxCF7LQpxb6uXhRbEuv?tab=summary&timestamp=146.0)
  - [Custom instructions and blacklisted words to avoid AI-generated content issues](https://fathom.video/share/KCax7jdusJAnGfxCF7LQpxb6uXhRbEuv?tab=summary&timestamp=442.0)
  - [Fact-checking process and trusted source database to ensure accuracy](https://fathom.video/share/KCax7jdusJAnGfxCF7LQpxb6uXhRbEuv?tab=summary&timestamp=146.0)
  - [Knowledge base creation for client-specific information and guidelines](https://fathom.video/share/KCax7jdusJAnGfxCF7LQpxb6uXhRbEuv?tab=summary&timestamp=685.0)

### Quality Assurance

  - [Multiple layers of review: AI assistance, human editing, fact-checking](https://fathom.video/share/KCax7jdusJAnGfxCF7LQpxb6uXhRbEuv?tab=summary&timestamp=146.0)
  - [Emphasis on avoiding mistakes related to location-specific information](https://fathom.video/share/KCax7jdusJAnGfxCF7LQpxb6uXhRbEuv?tab=summary&timestamp=392.0)
  - [Custom instructions to address sensitive topics (e.g., marine mammal centers)](https://fathom.video/share/KCax7jdusJAnGfxCF7LQpxb6uXhRbEuv?tab=summary&timestamp=402.0)
  - [Continuous calibration and improvement based on client feedback](https://fathom.video/share/KCax7jdusJAnGfxCF7LQpxb6uXhRbEuv?tab=summary&timestamp=439.0)

### SEO Strategy

  - [Focus on creating content clusters and interlinking strategy](https://fathom.video/share/KCax7jdusJAnGfxCF7LQpxb6uXhRbEuv?tab=summary&timestamp=318.0)
  - [Utilization of AI to identify relevant internal linking opportunities](https://fathom.video/share/KCax7jdusJAnGfxCF7LQpxb6uXhRbEuv?tab=summary&timestamp=1165.0)
  - [Emphasis on long-term growth and compounding results (3+ months for significant impact)](https://fathom.video/share/KCax7jdusJAnGfxCF7LQpxb6uXhRbEuv?tab=summary&timestamp=301.0)
  - [Ability to refresh and optimize existing content](https://fathom.video/share/KCax7jdusJAnGfxCF7LQpxb6uXhRbEuv?tab=summary&timestamp=1146.0)

### Collaboration Process

  - [Kickoff meeting to deep dive into client's business, audience, and offerings](https://fathom.video/share/KCax7jdusJAnGfxCF7LQpxb6uXhRbEuv?tab=summary&timestamp=588.0)
  - [Development of content strategy and roadmap within first two weeks](https://fathom.video/share/KCax7jdusJAnGfxCF7LQpxb6uXhRbEuv?tab=summary&timestamp=991.0)
  - [Regular communication and feedback loops with clients](https://fathom.video/share/KCax7jdusJAnGfxCF7LQpxb6uXhRbEuv?tab=summary&timestamp=987.0)
  - [Option for clients to review content or trust the process after initial calibration](https://fathom.video/share/KCax7jdusJAnGfxCF7LQpxb6uXhRbEuv?tab=summary&timestamp=1667.0)

### Content Management

  - [Use of a "Content OS" to track progress and status of all content pieces](https://fathom.video/share/KCax7jdusJAnGfxCF7LQpxb6uXhRbEuv?tab=summary&timestamp=1620.0)
  - [Integration with client's CMS for publishing and optimization](https://fathom.video/share/KCax7jdusJAnGfxCF7LQpxb6uXhRbEuv?tab=summary&timestamp=1694.0)
  - [Flexibility in content placement (blog, travel guides, sustainability sections)](https://fathom.video/share/KCax7jdusJAnGfxCF7LQpxb6uXhRbEuv?tab=summary&timestamp=1702.0)

## Next Steps

  - [Schedule a kickoff meeting in mid-December to begin information gathering and strategy development](https://fathom.video/share/KCax7jdusJAnGfxCF7LQpxb6uXhRbEuv?tab=summary&timestamp=600.0)
  - [The Adventures Group to prepare and share relevant documents and guidelines with GrowthX team](https://fathom.video/share/KCax7jdusJAnGfxCF7LQpxb6uXhRbEuv?tab=summary&timestamp=942.0)
  - [Discuss and decide on the level of involvement in content review process](https://fathom.video/share/KCax7jdusJAnGfxCF7LQpxb6uXhRbEuv?tab=summary&timestamp=942.0)
  - [Address any remaining questions or concerns before finalizing the agreement](https://fathom.video/share/KCax7jdusJAnGfxCF7LQpxb6uXhRbEuv?tab=summary&timestamp=942.0)
